channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Majority of Gold Medals at Kuvempu University Convocation Won by Female Students
item.description: At the 35th annual convocation of Kuvempu University, held at Shankaraghatta near Shivamogga, female students dominated the awards. Out of 79 gold medallists, 68 were girls, and of the 29 students rec...

item.title: La Salle Lady Spikers take early lead in UAAP Season 88 finals against NU
item.description: The La Salle Lady Spikers displayed exceptional form in Game 1 of the UAAP Season 88 women's volleyball finals, defeating the two-time defending champions NU Lady Bulldogs in straight sets, 25-23, 25-...

item.title: Experts and Leaders Discuss Climate Change Challenges on Pakistan's Agriculture Sector
item.description: The second Breathe Pakistan International Climate Change Conference took place in Islamabad, bringing together business leaders, policymakers, and climate experts to deliberate on the pressing challen...

item.title: Protesters disrupt Russian pavilion at Venice Biennale over Ukraine war
item.description: At the Venice Biennale, tensions flared as protesters blockaded the Russian pavilion in opposition to the war in Ukraine. Activist groups, including Russian collective Pussy Riot and Ukrainian members...

item.title: Punjab Political Leaders from Congress and BJP Criticise Bhagwant Mann's Statement on Blast
item.description: The news concerns a recent political disagreement in Punjab where both Congress and BJP leaders expressed their criticism of Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann's comments regarding a blast incident. While t...

item.title: Delay in Employment of 774 National Health Fellows Sparks Concern Over Government Commitment
item.description: More than one year after President Bola Tinubu promise automatic employment to 774 National Health Fellows, the beneficiaries say government never fulfil that pledge, leaving many of them stranded and...

item.title: Funeral held for Ontario police officer killed in Highway 401 crash
item.description: A funeral service is taking place today for an Ontario police officer who tragically lost his life in a crash on Highway 401. The live coverage begins at 10:30 a.m., allowing the public and colleagues...

item.title: Kericho Couple Overwhelmed with Joy After Daughters Surprise Them with Gifts
item.description: A couple from Keben village in Kericho County, Paul Koskei and his wife Nancy, were deeply touched after their daughters organised a surprise celebration and presented them with several meaningful gif...

item.title: Brela calls on Tanzanian athletes to protect and monetise their intellectual property
item.description: Brela has encouraged Tanzanian athletes and other sports stakeholders to register their intellectual property rights as a practical way to create steady income and protect what they create. This messa...

item.title: Dina Bonnevie opens up about the trauma of losing her husband
item.description: Veteran actress Dina Bonnevie has revealed that she continues to struggle emotionally after witnessing the tragic death of her husband. In interviews, she expressed how the experience has left a lasti...

item.title: Australian Football Association Calls for Melbourne to Lift Ban on 2026 World Cup Public Viewings
item.description: Di Australian Football Association don dey push make di Melbourne authorities change dem mind wey dem ban public watch parties for di 2026 FIFA World Cup for Federation Square. Di ban na because of pa...

item.title: Judge's daughter killed in domestic stabbing incident, partner charged
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in which the daughter of a judge was fatally stabbed by her partner. The case was presented in court, with details highlighting the escalation of domestic conflict that led ...

item.title: Ben Harvey discusses Trump's claims of victory over Iran and political acronyms
item.description: In the latest episode of 'Up Late,' Ben Harvey examines Donald Trump's recent statements regarding his self-proclaimed success in the Middle East, particularly in relation to Iran. With Operation Epic...

item.title: KZN opposition calls for suspension of officials over disputed bus contract
item.description: Opposition parties in the KwaZulu-Natal legislature are demanding the immediate suspension of senior transport officials implicated in alleged corruption involving a R6 million-a-month bus contract. M...

item.title: Pakistan's role in mediating US-Iran relations
item.description: The article reportedly discussed Pakistan's involvement in mediating tensions between the United States and Iran. While specific details could not be accessed, it likely highlighted the diplomatic cha...

item.title: Government budget savings claims questioned over reliance on projected reforms
item.description: In the lead-up to the federal budget, the Albanese government has been promoting what it describes as tens of billions of dollars in savings, aiming to strengthen its fiscal credibility. However, the ...

item.title: India and Japan strengthen partnership in quantum science and medical research
item.description: On 6th May 2026, India and Japan have reinforced their collaboration in cutting-edge technologies and health research through a series of high-level agreements signed in New Delhi. Japan’s Minister fo...

item.title: Meralco to pause electricity disconnections for May to July following ERC directive
item.description: The Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) has issued an order for all distribution utilities, including Meralco, to temporarily halt power disconnections for residential and non-residential consumers who...

item.title: Gas prices rise across Canada with highest costs in major urban regions
item.description: Gasoline prices across Canada increased again on Wednesday, continuing a trend that has been putting pressure on drivers nationwide. The latest hike reflects ongoing volatility in global oil markets, ...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets Hold 8th Overall Pick in 2026 NHL Draft
item.description: Following the NHL draft lottery on Tuesday night, the Winnipeg Jets will enter the 2026 NHL Entry Draft with the eighth overall pick. This is a significant opportunity for the team, as they have not h...
